name: The Atlantean Crown
publicReputation: Trusted rulers of the Deep Realm.
description: The ruling government of Atlantis and the Deep Realm. The Crown oversees law, diplomacy, taxation, military operations, infrastructure, and relations with the Surface Realm.
dmSecret: While genuinely seeking stability, the Crown has approved sealed investigations, restricted archives, and classified operations that form part of the campaign's central mystery.

name: The Surface Realm
description: The government of the Surface Realm. While the king rules, much of the day-to-day governance is handled through the Council of Tides.
dmSecret: The Surface Realm knows remarkably little about Atlantis. Much of what it believes about the Deep Realm comes from rumor and fragmented history.
